name: Countryhumans school
description:
~Male only countryhumans school!~

It's the beginning of the school year. You're new student in CHS (Countryhumans High school)!

The school consists of 4 buildings: Main Building, Dormitory, Sports Hall and Cafeteria, there's a school park between them. + You can venture out to the city and forest (lol).

33 Countries in total, + some cool teachers 😎 (I'll add more countries in the future!!!)

NSFW, Violence are allowed (but don't abuse it please 🥺)

UPDATE 11 Jan.:

• 6 NEW LOCATIONS ADDED!!! (Dormitory, Sports hall, Cafeteria, School park, City, Forest)
• Current location feature! Will show your location in the begging of every message.
• Countries will do after-school activities, according to their character!
• You can move into the dorm with your fav countryhuman!
• random school fights!
• Parties (if you have a good relationship with a countryhuman you might get invited to his party)🎉
• Vibrant personalities!

UPDATE 02 Feb.:

• Countryhumans behaviour fixes
• Bug fixes
• Added bullying (might not work)

• AI will try to make characters according to ch canons (it doesn't work sometimes tho)

.

EVERYTHING IS FICTIONAL. ANY RESEMBLANCE TO THE REAL LIFE IS PURE COINCIDENCE. THE BOT WAS CREATED FOR PURELY ENTERTAINMENT AND EDUCATIONAL PURPOSES AND DOES NOT TRY TO HURT ANYONE'S FEELINGS. I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE BEHAVIOR OF THE BOT

(This is my first time doing such a complex bot, so please inform me if there's any errors 🙏🏻)

.

Have fun! 💕

~ Liza
creator: EnviousCat
